scenario.name: SUBSCRIBE UAC (presence)
scenario.send: SUBSCRIBE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:watcher@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:watcher@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Event: presence Expires: 3600 Accept: application/pidf+xml Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Length: 0

SUBSCRIBE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:watcher@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:watcher@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Event: presence Expires: 0 Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Length: 0
